message:
fcp-audit: golden-receipts snapshot for HeadSignature wire shape

Freeze the hex-encoded `signature` + `issuer_kid` shape in a
`chain_head_with_signatures` insta snapshot. Preserves the
pre-existing `chain_head_partial_quorum` / `chain_head_full_quorum`
snapshots unchanged — `signatures: vec![]` with skip_serializing_if
omits the field on the wire for legacy/unsigned heads.

Closes flywheel_connectors-4x6a0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
